creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
cargo-0.10 package should be available shortly:
http://beefy6.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101amd64-default/416491/logs/cargo-0.10.0.log
http://pkg.freebsd.org/freebsd:10:x86:64/latest/All/cargo-0.10.0.txz

(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #3)
If you still want to pursue rustup integration open a separate bug/review. I expect you to hit the same issues as with any foreign packaging system:
- poudriere forbids networking during fetch phase
- mirroring support with FreeBSD infra
